description_long: This is a rustic barn complex consisting of two main structures: a larger rectangular barn with a steep gable roof and a smaller, attached shed with a curved, corrugated metal roof. The main barn features weathered vertical wooden siding, a single small window near the roofline, and a large barn door partially open, revealing a dark interior. The attached shed is constructed with similar aged wood and has a visibly rusted metal roof, with various items and debris stored along its side. Vegetation, including bushes and climbing plants, partially obscures the base of the buildings, adding to the aged, overgrown appearance. A tall utility pole stands adjacent to the barn, and the entire structure is set on a paved or concrete surface, suggesting an urban or semi-urban context. The overall impression is of a utilitarian, timeworn agricultural building adapted to a more developed environment.
description: A weathered wooden barn with a steep gable roof and an attached shed with a rusted curved metal roof, surrounded by overgrown vegetation and urban debris.
description_view_0: Front view showing both the main barn with its gable roof and the attached curved-roof shed, with a partially open barn door and visible utility pole.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the main barn, the steep gable roof, and dense vegetation along the wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of both structures, the rusted metal roof of the shed, and thick greenery at the base.
description_view_3: View of the shed's end with the curved metal roof, visible debris, and the utility pole in the foreground.
attribute_roof_type: steep gable roof on main barn, curved (barrel) roof on attached shed
attribute_door_style: single large hinged barn door, partially open, with additional smaller access door
attribute_window_arrangement: single small window near the roofline on the main barn, no visible windows on the shed
attribute_architectural_style: traditional American barn with attached utilitarian shed
